project_type: C++ AI assistant OS (header-only compilation unit model)
build_system: make with clang++ - single compilation unit (mk_entry.cpp includes all other .cpp files via #include)
test_framework: Custom test framework in tests/test_main.cpp with RUN_TEST macro, TEST_ASSERT macros
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'cd MK_OS && make' to compile. 2. Run 'cd MK_OS && make test' to run tests. Both must succeed with exit code 0.
setup_instructions: Build requires clang++ with C++17, libcurl, libsqlite3. Run 'cd MK_OS && make' to build.
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon. Build must compile on host with available clang++ and libraries. Network available for package installs.
contribution_requirements: No formal CONTRIBUTING.md. Code follows header-only .cpp pattern with #ifndef guards. All modules included from mk_entry.cpp.
key_patterns: 1. Modules are .cpp files with #ifndef guards, included via #include from mk_entry.cpp. 2. MKSystem struct holds all module instances. 3. handle_natural_query() is the main routing hub. 4. The conversation path checks isConversation() then cascades through engines. 5. cloud_llm.cpp and llm_engine.cpp are standalone modules NOT currently included. 6. brainMemory stores dialog turns but has no public getter for history string. 7. graph.getAll(query) returns vector<MKEdge> for RAG context.
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is the main project. system/mk_entry.cpp is the entry point. llm/ has LLM integration modules. ai_core/ has reasoning engines. mk_brain/ has memory/personality. tests/ has test suite.
